text: The angular lines and bright lighting make me feel both exposed and intrigued as I approach the entrance to this modern, glass-walled space. There is an air of anticipation—as if I am about to step into a realm of ideas, innovation, and inquiry. Inside, the bold "R+D" signals a devotion to research and development. The overlapping text, screens, and objects on vivid walls create an intellectual energy, inviting me to contemplate humanity’s relation to knowledge and technology. I feel a quiet exhilaration, ready to explore how our pursuits shape and are shaped by the spaces we inhabit.
